Package org.apache.avro

Class SchemaBuilder.DoubleDefault<R>

java.lang.Object

Enclosing class:
SchemaBuilder
public static class SchemaBuilder.DoubleDefault<R> extends SchemaBuilder.FieldDefault<R,SchemaBuilder.DoubleDefault<R>>
Choose whether to use a default value for the field or not.
